## What this changes
A short description.

## Why
The problem or motivation.

## Checklist
- [ ] `ruff check .` is clean
- [ ] `pytest -q` is green **without** a model key (credential-free)
- [ ] `make demo` still runs
- [ ] No secrets, local paths, or run artifacts committed
- [ ] No manufactured wins — any loss or limit is reported honestly
- [ ] New sample cases are true-by-construction (see CONTRIBUTING)
